summary: A smarter dashboard with weather, bill prep guidance, and workspace polish.

introduced: Dashboard greets you by name and shows today's WeatherKit forecast with high, low, and rain timing
Payment preparation card groups upcoming bills by category and currency so you know what to set aside
Analyze Now on the dashboard forces a refresh and shows when the next analysis runs
Cloud sync section on the dashboard for Nucleus Cloud and iCloud with connect actions
Five-minute idle timer returns the workspace to the Dashboard
npm run build:xcode for signed Debug builds with automatic provisioning
changed: Upcoming bills show relative due dates and a category icon on each row
Clipboard productivity section renamed to Productivity
Sidebar Nucleus logo opens the marketing website
Password-detected notifications stay visible until you save, dismiss, or open the menu bar prompt
